data.title: Law firm investigates claims for Ardent Health investors from July 18, 2024 - Nov 12, 2025. Encourages affected investors to contact.
data.description: Investors who endured losses in Ardent are urged by James (Josh) Wilson, Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner, to reach out directly to him to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in Ardent from July 18, 2024, to November 12, 2025, and wish to discuss your options, please contact him.

data.title: ZBD raises $40M in Series C to integrate real-money payments and rewards into video games, accelerating growth.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Hoboken, New Jersey, ZBD, a company specializing in facilitating real-money transactions for games and applications, revealed that it has successfully obtained $40 million in Series C funding from Blockstream Capital Partners ("BCP"). This investment is set to propel ZBD's expansion, solidifying its position as a leading player in the industry.

data.title: Knight-Swift Transportation Q4 earnings disappoint: 31 cents/share vs 36 cents/share estimate, $1.856 billion sales vs $1.900 billion estimate.
data.description: Transportation company Knight-Swift (NYSE: KNX) released disappointing fourth-quarter earnings, with earnings per share at 31 cents falling short of the projected 36 cents. Quarterly sales were reported at $1.856 billion, below the estimated $1.900 billion. The company anticipates first-quarter adjusted earnings ranging from 28 to 32 cents per share, differing from market expectations. For further details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: NVIDIA launches guide for local AI art generation, running FLUX.2 and LTX-2 models on RTX GPUs saves creators from cloud costs. (Read More)
data.description: NVIDIA has recently unveiled a detailed manual for utilizing FLUX.2 and LTX-2 visual AI models on RTX GPUs directly, removing the need for cloud expenses and token charges for developers. This move is expected to significantly reduce costs for creators using these models, making the process more efficient and cost-effective. By running the models locally, users can benefit from savings on expenses related to cloud services and token fees.

data.title: BTC may hit $95,000 by February, with signals pointing to a potential breakout above $90,000 resistance levels.
data.description: The latest reports on Bitcoin indicate a state of uncertainty as the cryptocurrency hovers around the $90,000 mark. Analysis of technical indicators hints at a possible surge above resistance levels in the upcoming weeks. Key figures predict that BTC could experience a significant price increase soon.

data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Bath & Body Works investors. Contact James Wilson if suffered losses. Timeframe: June 4, 2024 - November 19, 2025.
data.description: Investors who incurred losses in Bath & Body Works are encouraged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to reach out to him directly for a discussion on their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Bath & Body Works within the period of June 4, 2024, and November 19, 2025, and experienced losses, please consider contacting James Wilson to explore potential remedies.

data.title: SutiCLM by SutiSoft revolutionizes contract management with AI, streamlining workflows and boosting efficiency for businesses.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on January 22, 2026, it was reported that Artificial Intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing contract management for businesses. By automating workflows, AI technology within SutiCLM by SutiSoft is significantly cutting down errors, expediting negotiation processes, and enhancing compliance. This platform offers teams the ability to efficiently handle various stages of contract management, demonstrating the efficiency and benefits of AI within the business sector.

data.title: New research by Cohen Veterans Network to enhance firearm safety conversations and prevent veteran suicide, supported by Face the Fight®, shaping a toolkit.
data.description: In collaboration with Face the Fight®, a study is being conducted to develop a toolkit aimed at enhancing discussions about firearm safety and reducing veteran suicide risk. The research is being supported by Cohen Veterans Network (CVN), a worldwide non-profit organization focused on providing mental health services. This initiative, based in Stamford, Connecticut, was launched on January 22, 2026. The toolkit is expected to have a significant impact in addressing these crucial issues and potentially saving the lives of many veterans.

data.title: Trump choosing not to invade Greenland is a relief for Bitcoin, giving it a break from geopolitical tensions.
data.description: The decision has been made by US President Donald Trump to abstain from invading Greenland. This move has led to a sense of relief for Bitcoin as it navigates through geopolitical tensions impacting its pricing trends.

data.title: NuxGame, based in Cyprus, summarized its 2025 achievements, including technology updates, partnerships, and awards.
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus, on January 22, 2026, NuxGame released its 2025 annual review highlighting key accomplishments and advancements in its services. The review outlined significant technological improvements, product expansions, new partnerships, and accolades received throughout the year. This comprehensive overview showcases the company's progress and growth during the past year.

data.title: CFE announces start of cash tender offer, correction made to news release issued on 22-Jan-2026 by Comision Federal de Electricidad.
data.description: CFE has announced the initiation of a cash tender offer on 22-Jan-2026. The company, Comision Federal de Electricidad, has made revisions to the previous announcement. The corrected release provides further information regarding this tender offer.

data.title: Technology M&A volume surged to $4.9 trillion in 2025, driving a new $5 trillion growth cycle in cyber and security tech.
data.description: Representing QSE - Quantum Secure Encryption Corp, a statement was released in Vancouver, BC on January 22, 2026, revealing that the global markets are experiencing significant changes as technology mergers and acquisitions (M&A) hit a record high of approximately $4.9 trillion in 2025. This surge in M&A activity signifies a major shift in the market's structure and is indicative of...

data.title: Ventura Foods reveals new brand identity after thirty years, emphasizing growth and innovation.
data.description: Ventura Foods, a prominent player in the food manufacturing and innovation sector serving foodservice and retail industries globally, has unveiled a refreshed brand identity to commemorate three decades of continuous growth, expansion, and progress. The announcement was made in Irvine, Calif., on Jan. 22, 2026.

data.title: SciBase sees increased commitment in rights issue with major shareholder subscribing for their shares.
data.description: Today, in Stockholm on January 22, 2026, SciBase Holding AB, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven diagnostic tools for skin conditions, disclosed that one of its major stakeholders, Life Science Investment Fund 1, has committed to subscribing for additional shares. SciBase, listed as STO: SCIB, continues to pave the way in innovating skin disorder diagnosis through AI technology.

data.title: New on Nasdaq: 21Shares Dogecoin ETF, first U.S. spot Dogecoin ETF authorized by the SEC, is now trading.
data.description: The 21Shares product has recently launched for trading, making it the inaugural spot Dogecoin ETF in the United States to obtain approval from the SEC.
